questionHtml:
The smallest mass of magnesium that can be detected with this technique is 1.1 × 10−8 kg.

Show that the smallest number of magnesium atoms that can be detected with this technique is about 1017.

meta.title: The smallest mass of magnesium that can be detected with this technique is 1.1 × 10−8 kg. Show that the smallest number of magnesium atoms that can be detected with this technique
